signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Internal users only. Sign in using your Alga hosted account.

errors.hostNotAllowed: This base URL is not allowed for mobile sign-in.
errors.cannotOpenBrowser: Unable to open browser for sign-in.
errors.failedOpenBrowser: Failed to open browser. Please try again.
errors.verifySupport: Unable to verify mobile sign-in support on this server.
errors.domainNotAllowed: This server domain is not allowed for mobile sign-in.
errors.ssoNotConfigured: Microsoft/Google SSO is not configured for this server. Sign-in may require a password login.
errors.appleFailed: Sign in with Apple failed. Please try again.
errors.appleNoAccount: No Alga PSA account is linked to this Apple ID yet. Tap "Sign in" to enter your Alga PSA credentials or normal workspace login and we'll connect this Apple ID after you sign in. New Solo users can use "Set up a new account".

errors.stateMismatch: This sign-in link is not valid for the current session. Please try again.
errors.failedComplete: Failed to complete sign-in. Please try again.
errors.noPermission: Your account does not have permission to view tickets. Please contact your administrator.
errors.invalidRedirect: Sign-in is misconfigured for this app. Please contact your administrator and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.clientNotAllowed: Client portal users can't sign in to the mobile app. Please use an internal account.
errors.hostNotAllowlisted: This server domain is not allowed for mobile sign-in.
